vibe_and_tone: Polished, trustworthy, and efficient. The design should feel like a high-end enterprise tool. Clear typography, robust data tables, and a seamless booking flow with intuitive availability indicators.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Structured, functional density for dashboards. Generous padding around distinct content blocks to create optical separation.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0055FF] text-white hover:bg-[#0044CC] font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-colors data-[testid='primary-btn']
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm p-6 shadow-sm
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm p-6 shadow-sm hover:border-[#0055FF] hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer
cards.metric: bg-white border border-slate-200 border-l-4 border-l-[#0055FF] rounded-sm p-5 shadow-sm

inputs.default: border border-slate-300 rounded-sm px-3 py-2 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0055FF]/20 focus:border-[#0055FF] outline-none transition-all w-full
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1

tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-xs font-semibold uppercase text-slate-500 tracking-wider text-left

status_badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-b border-slate-200 shadow-sm
navigation.sidebar: w-64 bg-slate-900 text-slate-300 flex-shrink-0 h-screen fixed overflow-y-auto

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a responsive PWA with two main modules: User App and Admin App. Focus on high data clarity and professional interaction states.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements, forms, cards, and specific dashboard metrics MUST include descriptive `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='room-card-123'`, `data-testid='book-btn'`).
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_library: Use Shadcn/UI for tables, dialogs, forms, dropdowns, and date pickers. Customize the default Vercel look by applying the 1px 'Grid Border' technical style with very subtle rounded-sm corners instead of standard soft cards.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) for a high-end corporate feel. Install via `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Keep animations functional. Use subtle transitions on hover and micro-interactions for buttons and form validation. No heavy parallax or distractive scroll effects on dashboard views.
instructions_to_main_agent.admin_dashboard: Implement a 'Control Room' grid layout for the Admin section to maximize space usage. Ensure all columns in data tables align properly and feature inline quick actions.
instructions_to_main_agent.pwa: Ensure manifest.json and a basic service worker are included for the PWA requirement.
